The Manifesto AI Path Voices Archive
STAGE 01 — SAFETY DOCUMENTATION

Begin with the questions your people are already asking.

Safety is the first stage of the Movemental path. In two weeks of facilitated work, your organization produces seven ratifiable governance artifacts that answer the questions your staff, board, and community are already asking about AI. The cost is $1,000. The deliverables are concrete. The work is yours when it's done.

"Two weeks. $1,000. Seven deliverables your board can ratify."
WHAT YOU'LL PRODUCE

Seven deliverables. Each one ratifiable.

Each deliverable is named, scoped, and produced in collaboration with your team. By the end of two weeks, your organization has the foundation for any AI deployment that follows. The work is not theoretical.

01

Acceptable Use Statement

Defining the precise parameters of where AI meets your mission and where it is strictly excluded from organizational output.

02

Care Boundaries

Establishing the human checkpoints required to ensure AI systems do not infringe upon the dignity of your community.

03

Disclosure Standards

A clear set of protocols for when and how you notify stakeholders about the use of generative or analytical AI tools.

04

Vendor and Tool Inventory

A comprehensive audit of current shadow AI usage and a whitelist of approved enterprise-grade platforms.

05

Data Handling Protocol

Technical and ethical guardrails for protecting sensitive organizational data from being ingested into public training models.

06

Incident Response Plan

A step-by-step procedure for identifying and mitigating hallucinations, bias, or security breaches in AI outputs.

07

Named Refusals

A definitive list of tasks and territories that will remain exclusively human-driven regardless of technological capability.

THE PROCESS

Two weeks of facilitated work.

WEEK 1

Day 1 Kickoff

Synchronous mapping of organizational needs and current AI friction points.

WEEK 1

Drafting

Movemental produces the first iterations of the seven safety artifacts for your team.

WEEK 2

Review

We operate on a simple flat fee. $1,000 is invoiced upon engagement. Net 15 terms apply. If we cannot deliver the seven deliverables, the fee is waived. No hidden retainers or "success" fees.

WEEK 2

Final Day Handoff

Seven ratifiable documents delivered to your governance team.

"Total facilitator time: roughly 8 hours synchronous plus async drafting support."

MOVEMENTAL FIELD GUIDE

Stage 01: Safety

A SIXTEEN PAGE PROTOCOL FOR INSTITUTIONAL ARTICULATION

NOT READY YET?

Start with the free toolkit.

Before you commit to a facilitated engagement, read the toolkit. This 16-page field guide outlines the exact methodology we use to define Safety, including the foundational prompts and constraints we use to build governance.

Institutional Ethics apply. We do not share your data.

PRICING

$1,000. Net 15 from signing.

What's included

  • check 8 hours synchronous facilitation
  • check Asynchronous drafting & editing
  • check Final 7-artifact documentation package
  • check Board-ready ratification summary

What's not

  • close Direct board member lobbying
  • close Ongoing technical AI monitoring
  • close Legal representation or counsel

Payment terms

We operate on a simple flat fee. $1,000 is invoiced upon engagement. Net 15 terms apply. No hidden retainers or "success" fees.

Begin with Safety.

Most organizations who walk the Movemental path begin here. It is the necessary prerequisite for any technological leap. Without Safety, progress is just speed without direction.
